data.title: One Liberty Properties Q4 Earnings Report: What Investors Need to Know
data.description: One Liberty Properties (NYSE: OLP) released its Q4 earnings on Thursday, March 5, 2026, at 04:15 PM. In a notable performance, the company exceeded estimated earnings by 77.78%, reporting an EPS of $0.48 compared to the expected $0.27. Total revenue saw an increase of $885 thousand from the previous year's same quarter. In the prior quarter, the company also outperformed expectations. data.title: SEC suggests framework to regulate cryptocurrency tokens under securities laws, with more authority than previous statements.
data.description: According to reports, the SEC's proposed interpretation of federal securities laws regarding digital assets holds greater significance than previous staff-level declarations.

data.title: Praxis Solutions Launches WealthHawk to Help Advisors Drive Organic Growth
data.description: In Newport Beach, California on March 5, 2026, Praxis Solutions introduced WealthHawk, a cutting-edge money-in-motion intelligence platform aimed at aiding financial advisors in navigating the competitive landscape of organic growth within the wealth management sector. This innovative tool is set to revolutionize the industry by providing essential insights and analysis to help advisors enhance their services and increase their market share efficiently.

data.title: Miami Climate 365 Announces Event Lineup for Miami Climate Week 2026
data.description: From March 14 to 21, 2026, Miami-Dade will witness over 40 community events aimed at combating extreme heat, flooding, and promoting local climate solutions. The initiative, Miami Climate 365 (MC365), brings together public, private, and community sectors. This concerted effort highlights the urgent need to address climate challenges. Events throughout the county will engage residents in discussions and actions to tackle environmental issues. The initiative provides a platform for around 40 events to mobilize the community and drive sustainable solutions in Miami-Dade.

data.title: Unlikely Collaborators Hosts Astrophysicist Dr. Lisa Kaltenegger Are We Alone in the Universe?
data.description: Exploring Existence, Perception, and Our Position in the Universe LOS ANGELES, Mar 5, 2026 - The quest for extraterrestrial life has transitioned from fiction to fact, marking a groundbreaking moment in our civilization. Researchers are now examining celestial bodies beyond our own, leading to a profound introspection into humanity's place in the grand scheme of the cosmos.

data.title: Monroe Capital Corporation BDC Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: In Chicago on March 5, 2026, Monroe Capital Corporation (NASDAQ: MRCC) disclosed its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. The Board of Directors announced a first quarter distribution of $0.09 per share, scheduled for payment on March 31, 2026, for stockholders listed on record as of March 16, 2026.
